articles.title: Claude Helped a Hacker Find a Way to Issue Tickets to Almost Every US Music Festival
articles.raw_content: A researcher found that using Anthropic’s Claude Opus 4.7, he could break into the website of Front Gate—used by every festival from Lollapalooza to Bonnaroo—and freely issue any ticket he chose.
articles.summary: Un investigador ha descubierto una vulnerabilidad en el sitio web de Front Gate, permitiendo emitir tickets de festival sin restricciones mediante Claude Opus 4.7 de Anthropic.

articles.title: Cyient lays out the blueprint for intelligent network modernization
articles.raw_content: At DTW Ignite, Cyient stressed the continuum between network engineering, data foundation and cognitive operations that will drive autonomy, efficiency and growth Across the telecoms industry, the language of AI-augmented networks and increasingly autonomous operations has become familiar. The harder…
articles.summary: Cyient destaca la conexión entre ingeniería de redes, datos y operaciones cognitivas para impulsar la autonomía y el crecimiento en el sector de las telecomunicaciones.

articles.title: Trump drops restrictions on Anthropic’s Mythos and Fable models
articles.raw_content: The Trump administration's erratic approach to AI policymaking has left companies across the industry with little clarity about what will govern future model releases.
articles.summary: La administración Trump ha generado incertidumbre en la industria de la IA al no ofrecer una política clara para futuras versiones de modelos.

articles.title: Crypto exchange OKX wants AI agents to hire and pay each other
articles.raw_content: OKX is bringing together payments, identity and reputation into a marketplace for AI agents.
articles.summary: OKX lanza un mercado para agentes de IA que integra pagos, identidad y reputación.

articles.title: China Tower shifts to ‘digital’ and ‘intelligent’ towers
articles.raw_content: China Tower has established about 6.2 million base station sites, including 3.26 million 5G sites across the Asian nation In sum – what to know: Tower transformation – China Tower said at MWC Shanghai that it will accelerate the transformation…
articles.summary: China Tower cuenta con 6,2 millones de estaciones base, de las que 3,26 millones son sitios 5G.

articles.title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
articles.raw_content:
Federal authorities are offering a reward of up to $10 million for information leading to the identification or location of a Russian state cyber group that has compromised thousands of Signal and WhatsApp accounts belonging to investigative reporters and US government employees.

The operation has been active since at least March, when the FBI published an advisory warning of ongoing phishing campaigns targeting high-value targets by attackers associated with Russian intelligence services. Messages masquerading as automated support communications ask that users click a link or provide verification codes or account passcodes. In the event the user complies, they unknowingly link the attacker's device to their account or have their account completely taken over and are locked out.

Read full article

Comments
articles.summary: Las autoridades federales ofrecen hasta 10 millones de dólares por información sobre un grupo cibernético ruso que ha comprometido cuentas de Signal y WhatsApp.

articles.title: This Humanoid Robot Is a Terrifyingly Competent Office Intern
articles.raw_content: Flexion Robotics, a startup founded by ex-Nvidia engineers, has a clever way of training robots to do useful work.
articles.summary: Flexion Robotics, fundada por exingenieros de Nvidia, desarrolla un método innovador para entrenar robots en tareas útiles.

articles.title: China’s Z.ai claims it can match Mythos on cybersecurity
articles.raw_content:
China's Zhipu AI (Z.ai) released its open-weight GLM-5.2, and some researchers have claimed that it matches Mythos in certain bug-finding and cybersecurity scenarios. While GLM lags behind models from Anthropic and OpenAI in other, more general tasks, it seems that China has dramatically reduced the gap in the capabilities between its models and those of the US.

This level of advancement is particularly concerning to the US government, which has worked to restrict China's access to powerful models like Anthropic's Mythos and Fable, as well as the hardware necessary to train and run them. The Trump administration views Mythos and other advan …

Read the full story at The Verge.
articles.summary: Zhipu AI de China lanza GLM-5.2, que iguala a Mythos en ciberseguridad en algunos escenarios.
